creator: sakai@miya3f12.ee.kagu.sut.ac.jp
text:
This is port of EyeClock-2.0.
EyeClock-2.0 is different from EyeClock-1.x for all.

  * Eyes are pixmaps. (not circles)
  * Configured by X-Toolkit resources.
  * Many sample clocks were added.
  * Modified many many bugs.

Fix: Following lines is ports of EyeClock-2.0.
